findings.title: Missing content-security-policy
findings.description: The apex response did not include content-security-policy.

findings.title: Missing permissions-policy
findings.description: The apex response did not include permissions-policy.

findings.title: MTA-STS not detected
findings.description: Mail exchangers were observed, but no _mta-sts TXT policy was found.

findings.title: SMTP TLS reporting not detected
findings.description: Mail exchangers were observed, but no _smtp._tls TLS-RPT record was found.

findings.title: Client-side stack signals exposed
findings.description: Observed JavaScript/runtime indicators: react, google-tag-manager, hotjar.

notes: No brute-force subdomain enumeration is performed.
HTTP collection is limited to the apex and common redirect target.
DNS and WHOIS lookups use local system/network resolvers only.
The scanner is intended for reconnaissance and posture review, not exploitation.
Active TCP probing was enabled for a curated port set on resolved IPs.

cveCorrelation.rationale: Reliable CVE matching needs a maintained software-version knowledge base. The scanner currently surfaces version and banner evidence only.

whoisLinkedDomains.rationale: Reverse WHOIS expansion requires a comparison corpus or external index. The local scanner currently fingerprints ownership data only.

observedInfrastructure.rationale: Clusters are derived from certificate SANs, observed hosts, MX targets, and nameservers seen during passive collection.
